response.original_title: How long do Royal Caribbean refunds take? Know the Process
response.overview: Royal Caribbean refunds typically take 7 to 10 business days 1 877 664 1281 to process after approval, though some may take up to 30 days to post depending on your financial institution. Pre-cruise cancellations (via My Royal Cruise) 1 877 664 1281  are generally processed faster than others, while onboard refunds are credited to your account 1 877 664 1281 .
response.title: How long do Royal Caribbean refunds take? Know the Process
